FINAL_STEP_WARNING: This export contains your sensitive information about you. If someone gains access to this file, they could view your private messages, your location, and/or your search history. Treat it as securely as you would a password or financial records.

platforms.name: Google
platforms.overview: Google allows you to download a copy of your data through Google Takeout, which includes your Gmail, Google Photos, Google Drive, and other Google services.
platforms.notes: The download can be large depending on your data volume.

steps.title: Visit Google Takeout and sign in
Select data categories
description: Click **Deselect all** first
Mandatory: Select **Access Log Activity**, **Google Account**, and **My Activity**.
Optional: Select **Chrome** for web history, **Messages** for Google Voice & Google Fi histories, **Pixel** for Pixel phone data, amd **Profile** for your account biographic details.
Optional: Select **Mail** only if you need to scan emails. This may make the file huge and may crash the tool. Filter emails by date or category if possible.

alert.text: If a category offers a **Multiple format** button and JSON is an option, you must select JSON for compatibility.

steps.title: Choose file type, frequency and destination
description: Destination: **Select download link via email**. Choosing 'Add to Drive/Dropbox' instead may leave a permanent record in the storage app that might be synced to a shared computer.
Frequency: **Export once**
File type & size: .zip and 2GB recommended

alert.text: Anyone with access to this email could download your data.

steps.title: Create export
steps.description: Review your selections and click **Create export**.

steps.title: Wait and download
description: You don't need to stay on this page. Google will email you when the file is ready. This may take 1 hour or 4-5 days depending on file size.
Once the file is ready, it is usually only available for 7 days.
If you are sharing an account or device, remember to delete the notification email once you receive it.
Download and save to a secure location.
Your download link will be available for 7 days.

platforms.name: Discord
platforms.overview: Discord provides a data export feature in your account settings that includes your messages, servers, direct messages, and activity history.

steps.title: Open Discord Settings
steps.description: Click the settings gear icon next to your username in the bottom left corner.

steps.title: Navigate to Privacy & Safety
steps.description: Scroll down in the left sidebar to find 'Privacy & safety' section.

steps.title: Request Data Export
description: This includes your messages and server membership records
Discord may ask for password confirmation
The export usually completes within 1-24 hours

steps.title: Download Your Data
description: File is typically in .zip format
Download to a secure device
Delete any temporary copies from cloud storage

platforms.name: Apple
platforms.overview: Apple provides a comprehensive data export through their Data and Privacy portal...

steps.title: Visit Privacy.apple.com
steps.description: Go to https://privacy.apple.com and sign in with your Apple ID.

steps.title: Select 'Data and Privacy'
steps.description: Click on 'Data and Privacy' to access your account information tools.

steps.title: Choose 'Download Your Data'
description: Apple will send a verification code to your trusted device
Complete two-factor authentication
Select the categories you want to export

steps.title: Receive and Download
description: Check both email and device for notification
Download link is valid for 7 days
Save to a secure password-protected device

platforms.name: Facebook / Instagram
platforms.overview: Facebook (Meta) offers a comprehensive data download through your settings...

steps.title: Open Facebook Settings
steps.description: Click the menu icon and go to Settings & privacy.

steps.title: Find 'Your Information'
steps.description: Look for 'Your information' section in the left sidebar.

steps.title: Download Your Information
description: Confirm your password
Choose data format (HTML or JSON)
Select date range

steps.title: Wait for Preparation
description: Large exports may take up to 24 hours
Download available for 7 days

platforms.name: Snapchat
platforms.overview: Snapchat provides data exports through their account settings...

steps.title: Open Snapchat Settings
steps.description: Go to your profile page and tap the gear icon.

steps.title: Navigate to Account Settings
steps.description: Scroll to 'Account' section and find data options.

steps.title: Request Your Data
description: Snapchat may ask for password
Processing typically takes 1-7 days

steps.title: Receive Link
description: Check email for download notification
Store on a secure device
